title: Data Retention Policy
body: Current retention rules: Emails: 3 years; Customer records: 5 years after account closure; Financial records: 5 years; Legal documents: 10 years. These periods comply with internal policy and general regulations. For specific regulatory requirements, contact the compliance department.

title: Data Classification Policy
body: All data must be classified as Public, Internal, Confidential, or Restricted. Classification guides can be found in the Data Governance portal.

title: Security Incident Response Plan
body: In the event of a security incident, follow the procedures outlined in this document. Immediately notify the SOC team at soc@company.com.
